structured.name: Get Base Report
structured.objective: To give the CSMS the ability to request a predefined report as defined in ReportBase.
structured.description:
This use case describes how the CSMS requests a Charging Station to send a predefined report
as defined in ReportBase. The result will be returned asynchronously in one or more
NotifyReportRequest messages.
scenario: 1. The CSO triggers the CSMS to request a report from a Charging Station.
2. The CSMS requests the Charging Station for a report with GetBaseReportRequest.
3. The Charging Station responds with GetBaseReportResponse.

4. The Charging Station asynchronously sends the results in one or more NotifyReportRequest
messages.
5. The CSMS responds with NotifyReportResponse for each NotifyReportRequest.
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The Charging Station was able to send the requested report.
Failure postcondition:
The Charging Station was not able to send the requested report.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging
Station receives a
getBaseReportRequest
for a supported
reportBase
AND NOT B07.FR.13
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
getBaseReportResponse with
Accepted.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging
Station receives a
getBaseReportRequest
for a reportBase that is
not supported
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
getBaseReportResponse with
NotSupported.

The Charging Station SHALL send the
requested information, excluding the
value of WriteOnly variables, via one or
more NotifyReportRequest messages
to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
B07.FR.01
AND
The
getBaseReportRequest
contained a requestId
requirements.definition:
Every NotifyReportRequest send for
this getBaseReportRequest SHALL
contain the same requestId.

The Charging Station SHALL NOT
send a NotifyReportRequest to the
CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
B07.FR.01 AND
When reportBase is
ConfigurationInventory
requirements.definition:
Then the Charging Station SHALL
respond with a NotifyReportRequest
to report on all component-variables
that can be set by the operator
including their VariableCharacteristics.

requirements.precondition:
B07.FR.01 AND
When reportBase is
FullInventory
requirements.definition:
Then the Charging Station SHALL
respond with a NotifyReportRequest
to report on all component-variables
including their VariableCharacteristics.

requirements.precondition:
B07.FR.01 AND
When reportBase is
SummaryInventory
requirements.definition:
Then the Charging Station SHALL
respond with a NotifyReportRequest
to report on components and
variables related to the availability and
condition of the Charging Station,
notably operationalStatus of the
Charging Station, EVSE and
Connectors and any error condition.

The sequence number contained in
the seqNo field of the
NotifyReportRequest is incremental
per report. So the
NotifyReportRequest message which
contains the first report part, SHALL
have a seqNo with value 0.

All attribute types of a variable, that
are supported by the Charging Station,
SHALL be reported, even if they have
no value (are unset).

The Charging Station SHALL support
at least the base reports:
ConfigurationInventory and
FullInventory.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging
Station is temporarily
unable to execute a
report request
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
getBaseReportResponse with
Rejected.

requirements.precondition:
When a Charging Station
connects to CSMS for
the first time OR
whenever CSMS
suspects that the device
model of the Charging
Station has changed (e.g.
after a firmware update
or hardware change)
requirements.definition:
CSMS SHOULD request a
GetBaseReportRequest with
reportBase = FullInventory to
retrieve a complete list of all its device
model components and variables.

chunks.content:
# B07 - Get Base Report

**Objective:** To give the CSMS the ability to request a predefined report as defined in ReportBase.

**Description:** This use case describes how the CSMS requests a Charging Station to send a predefined report
as defined in ReportBase. The result will be returned asynchronously in one or more
NotifyReportRequest messages.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. The CSO triggers the CSMS to request a report from a Charging Station.
2. The CSMS requests the Charging Station for a report with GetBaseReportRequest.
3. The Charging Station responds with GetBaseReportResponse.
4. The Charging Station asynchronously sends the results in one or more NotifyReportRequest
messages.
5. The CSMS responds with NotifyReportResponse for each NotifyReportRequest.

**Prerequisites:** n/a

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
The Charging Station was able to send the requested report.
Failure postcondition:
The Charging Station was not able to send the requested report.

# B07 - Requirements

**B07.FR.01**
Precondition: When the Charging
Station receives a
getBaseReportRequest
for a supported
reportBase
AND NOT B07.FR.13
The Charging Station SHALL send a
getBaseReportResponse with
Accepted.

**B07.FR.02**
Precondition: When the Charging
Station receives a
getBaseReportRequest
for a reportBase that is
not supported
The Charging Station SHALL send a
getBaseReportResponse with
NotSupported.

**B07.FR.03**
Precondition: B07.FR.01
The Charging Station SHALL send the
requested information, excluding the
value of WriteOnly variables, via one or
more NotifyReportRequest messages
to the CSMS.

**B07.FR.04**
Precondition: B07.FR.01
AND
The
getBaseReportRequest
contained a requestId
Every NotifyReportRequest send for
this getBaseReportRequest SHALL
contain the same requestId.

**B07.FR.05**
Precondition: B07.FR.02
The Charging Station SHALL NOT
send a NotifyReportRequest to the
CSMS.

**B07.FR.07**
Precondition: B07.FR.01 AND
When reportBase is
ConfigurationInventory
Then the Charging Station SHALL
respond with a NotifyReportRequest
to report on all component-variables
that can be set by the operator
including their VariableCharacteristics.

**B07.FR.08**
Precondition: B07.FR.01 AND
When reportBase is
FullInventory
Then the Charging Station SHALL
respond with a NotifyReportRequest
to report on all component-variables
including their VariableCharacteristics.

**B07.FR.09**
Precondition: B07.FR.01 AND
When reportBase is
SummaryInventory
Then the Charging Station SHALL
respond with a NotifyReportRequest
to report on components and
variables related to the availability and
condition of the Charging Station,
notably operationalStatus of the
Charging Station, EVSE and
Connectors and any error condition.

**B07.FR.10**
The sequence number contained in
the seqNo field of the
NotifyReportRequest is incremental
per report. So the
NotifyReportRequest message which
contains the first report part, SHALL
have a seqNo with value 0.

**B07.FR.11**
Precondition: B07.FR.08
All attribute types of a variable, that
are supported by the Charging Station,
SHALL be reported, even if they have
no value (are unset).

**B07.FR.12**
The Charging Station SHALL support
at least the base reports:
ConfigurationInventory and
FullInventory.

**B07.FR.13**
Precondition: When the Charging
Station is temporarily
unable to execute a
report request
The Charging Station SHALL send a
getBaseReportResponse with
Rejected.

**B07.FR.14**
Precondition: When a Charging Station
connects to CSMS for
the first time OR
whenever CSMS
suspects that the device
model of the Charging
Station has changed (e.g.
after a firmware update
or hardware change)
CSMS SHOULD request a
GetBaseReportRequest with
reportBase = FullInventory to
retrieve a complete list of all its device
model components and variables.
